markdownRemark.html:
Our fatigue subtly sets in,
Rest and all of her charms beckon,
Darkness is destined to ascend,
The light bringer will come again,
Day almost played out to her end,
Beaten down by the hour hand,
Beauty's shadowed with all darkened,
The curtain's called across the land,
An encore is not to be played,
Left with the darkness we've to brave,
As it was, just hidden by change,
No longer do scenes look the same,
My pleasant green land turned away,
The shame of such beauty in shade,
Facing west with goodbyes to say,
Never to be caught running late.

markdownRemark.rawMarkdownBody:
Our fatigue subtly sets in,  
Rest and all of her charms beckon,  
Darkness is destined to ascend,  
The light bringer will come again,  
Day almost played out to her end,  
Beaten down by the hour hand,  
Beauty's shadowed with all darkened,  
The curtain's called across the land,  
An encore is not to be played,  
Left with the darkness we've to brave,  
As it was, just hidden by change,  
No longer do scenes look the same,  
My pleasant green land turned away,  
The shame of such beauty in shade,  
Facing west with goodbyes to say,  
Never to be caught running late.
